结节病.title: Overlap syndrome between sarcoidosis and Sjogren's disease presenting as hypopituitarism: case report and review of literature.
结节病.authors: Iwamoto Y, Yoshimura N, Harada A, Fushimi Y, Okamoto Y, Kimura T, Shimoda M, Nakanishi S, Mizuta Y, Tsurui S, Matsumoto S, Koike Y, Nishimura T, Kaneto H
结节病.summary: 结节病与干燥综合征重叠可致全垂体功能减退，激素替代有效，但干燥综合征相关间质性肺炎需免疫抑制治疗。

结节病.title: Occurrence and Progression Risk of Uveitic Glaucoma.
结节病.authors: Sada I, Kihara K, Hiyama T, Minamoto A, Hirooka K, Harada Y, Sakaguchi H
结节病.summary: 日本成人葡萄膜炎患者青光眼发生率高达31.6%，IOP波动加速病情进展。

ILD.title: Osimertinib plus datopotamab deruxtecan in patients with EGFR-mutated advanced NSCLC after progression on first-line osimertinib: ORCHARD.
ILD.authors: Riess JW, Yu HA, Le X, de Langen AJ, Cho BC, Piotrowska Z, Hendriks LEL, Morabito A, Bonanno L, Brustugun OT, Halvorsen TO, Kim YJ, Marrone KA, Shiraishi Y, Goldman JW, Ambrose H, Smith PE, FraenkeI PG, Tang KH, Lehman JM, Goldberg SB
ILD.summary: 奥希替尼联合Dato-DXd一线治疗后进展的EGFR突变晚期NSCLC患者ORR达43%，中位PFS 9.5-11.7个月。

ILD.title: Anticancer drug-induced interstitial lung disease: a critical appraisal of clinical practice guidelines and consensus statements.
ILD.authors: Zhang Y, Ma Z, Sun X, Zhang Y, Zhu M, Zhang S, Feng X, An Z
ILD.summary: 评估显示抗癌药物引起的间质性肺病指南质量差异大，建议需加强制定过程中的利益相关方参与。

ILD.title: Interstitial lung disease and the STING pathway.
ILD.authors: Velu PP, Zhu G, Mackenzie KJ
ILD.summary: STING免疫通路在SAVI和COPA综合征的间质性肺病发病中起关键作用，但与其更常见类型的关联尚不明确。

ILD.title: Izalontamab brengitecan (Iza-bren; BL-B01D1), a first-in-class EGFR-HER3 bispecific antibody-drug conjugate, for patients with EGFR-mutated NSCLC: pooled analysis of phase I and phase II trials.
ILD.authors: Hong SD, Wang YS, Zhao HY, Zhao YY, Wang QM, Ma YX, Li YS, Huang Y, Yang YP, Fu ZM, Chen LK, Zhou F, Yang J, Li XY, Hou X, Zhou NN, Sun LH, Zhang GF, Cui JW, Wu L, Chen G, Zhang YX, Wang HY, Lv DQ, Shi JH, Jiang B, Li C, Li XL, Tang KJ, Yu Y, Ji YH, He ZY, Zhu Y, Zhu H, Xiao S, Zhou CC, Zhang L, Fang WF
ILD.summary: Iza-bren (BL-B01D1)在EGFR突变NSCLC中显示47.4%客观缓解率，为TKI进展后提供新疗法。

ILD.title: Pulmonary toxicity of immune-checkpoint inhibitors.
ILD.authors: Mahiat C, Cadranel J, Fallet V, Meteye C, Gendarme S, Slomka J, Canellas A
ILD.summary: 免疫检查点抑制剂相关肺炎虽罕见，但致死率高，需警惕高危人群并规范处理。

ILD.title: Trastuzumab deruxtecan: An antibody-drug conjugates for non-small cell lung cancer.
ILD.authors: Siddiqui N, Sravanthi G, Reddy KJK, Salomi K, Rao TR, Rajesham VV
ILD.summary: T-DXd作为HER2突变转移性NSCLC的二线治疗，显示高客观缓解率和疾病控制率，但需警惕间质性肺炎。

ILD.title: Combined immunosuppressive therapy in systemic sclerosis-associated interstitial lung disease: phenotypes matter.
ILD.authors: Marchetti M, Motta F, Tonutti A, Selmi C, De Santis M
ILD.summary: SSc-ILD中联合免疫抑制方案需基于炎症和纤维化表型个体化选择。

ILD.title: Childhood Interstitial Lung Disease-Successful Application of a Stepwise Diagnostic Classification.
ILD.authors: Rapp CK, Griese M
ILD.summary: 一种三步诊断分类法能有效区分儿童间质性肺病的病因，遗传检测诊断率达50.8%。

ILD.title: Using Genetic Risk Scores for Rheumatoid Arthritis-Associated Interstitial Lung Disease Risk Stratification.
ILD.authors: McDermott GC, Sparks JA
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: Artificial intelligence and radiomics in drug-induced interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Marchi G, Fanni SC, Mercier M, Cefalo J, Salerni C, Ferioli M, Candoli P, Romei C, Gori L, Cucchiara F, Cenerini G, Guglielmi G, Pistelli F, Carrozzi L, Mondoni M
ILD.summary: 人工智能和放射组学在药物性间质性肺病早期诊断和风险分层中展现出潜力。

ILD.title: Direct Oral Anticoagulant Consumption and the Risk of Acute Interstitial Lung Diseases: A Case-Crossover Study Using Japanese Administrative Data.
ILD.authors: Anan K, Itaya T, Kataoka Y, Ichikado K, Kawamura K, Yamamoto Y
ILD.summary: 使用日本行政数据库的病例交叉研究发现，直接口服抗凝剂与急性间质性肺病住院风险增加存在关联。

ILD.title: Granulomatous-Lymphocytic Interstitial Lung Disease in Common Variable Immunodeficiency with a Rapid Progression and Refractory Infections.
ILD.authors: Tokunaga R, Masunaga A, Koga M, Akaike K, Okabayashi H, Iyama S, Tomita Y, Ichiyasu H, Sakagami T
ILD.summary: 一例CVID患者合并肉芽肿性淋巴样间质性肺炎，尽管积极治疗仍快速进展并死于感染。

ILD.title: Incidence of interstitial lung disease in seropositive rheumatoid arthritis patients receiving biologics, Janus kinase inhibitors, or methotrexate.
ILD.authors: Yoon J, Han M, Song JJ, Lee SW, Jung I, Park YB
ILD.summary: 在血清阳性类风湿关节炎患者中，使用生物制剂或JAK抑制剂与甲氨蝶呤相比，间质性肺病发病率无显著差异。

ILD.title: Clinical features, pathogenesis, and treatment of anti-MDA5 antibody-positive interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Yamaguchi K
ILD.summary: 抗MDA5抗体阳性皮肌炎相关间质性肺病以快速进展、预后差为特征，三联疗法可改善结局。

ILD.title: Mechanisms of Surfactant Maturation in Development and Disease.
ILD.authors: Pranty AI, Cuevas Ocana S, Dickens JA
ILD.summary: 肺泡表面活性物质成熟异常导致从新生儿到成人的呼吸疾病。

ILD.title: Cutaneous manifestations in myositis syndromes.
ILD.authors: Schedler NC, Raheel O, de la Garza JAC, Edminister JR
ILD.summary: 特发性炎性肌病的皮肤表现与特定自身抗体、间质性肺炎和恶性肿瘤风险相关。

ILD.title: A machine learning-based classification model for interstitial lung disease in rheumatoid arthritis.
ILD.authors: Li M, Wang Q, He J, Wang X, Xu Y, Yang L, Feng L
ILD.summary: 基于常规临床指标构建的机器学习模型可有效分类RA相关间质性肺病。

ILD.title: Drug-induced Interstitial Lung Disease with a Hypersensitivity Pneumonitis Pattern Following Pembrolizumab Plus Epirubicin and Cyclophosphamide Therapy: First Report with Pathological Findings.
ILD.authors: Kaburaki S, Tanaka T, Kamio K, Tanaka Y, Kasahara K, Terasaki Y, Seike M
ILD.summary: 帕博利珠单抗联合表柔比星和环磷酰胺可致过敏性肺炎型间质性肺病。

ILD.title: Integrated machine learning risk model for predicting radiation pneumonitis in lung cancer patients with interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Lu H, Jiang A, Yuan Z, Chen D
ILD.summary: 该研究开发了一种整合临床、剂量学和炎症指标的机器学习模型，可有效预测间质性肺病肺癌患者放疗后放射性肺炎风险。

ILD.title: Early risk response to vasodilators and outcomes in interstitial lung disease associated pulmonary hypertension.
ILD.authors: Teramachi R, Fukihara J, Ichihara S, Kataoka K, Takei R, Yamano Y, Watanabe F, Yokoyama T, Kimura T, Kondoh Y
ILD.summary: 血管扩张剂治疗后风险分层改善与间质性肺病相关肺动脉高压患者预后较好相关。
